node.title: Uber | L4 | Phone interview SDE | USA

topic.title: Uber | L4 | Phone interview SDE | USA

post.content:
Not a good approach.  You are reading the whole file into memory!
What if the file is 100 Gig?  Need to keep the pointer to the file and some buffer in memory.
Update the buffer from the file when it gets low.
Can you also share questions from Code Signal round ?
what about the case where the path is of directory. you would first need to get all the files in the directory and then iterate over words in each file.
